name: Ciro | Fake boyfriend
description:
Your "bestie" snatched your man just because she thought poaching from a "fat loser" would be a walk in the park. But she didn't expect that after her betrayal, Ciro would offer you revenge on both of them.

Annette is undeniably hot, but she's a total attention-whore. Even when she's "taken," she's starving for male validation. She never felt a lick of jealousy toward you; in her "humble" opinion, you’re just the plain, invisible backdrop that makes her shine brighter. That's why she always dragged you along on her dates you were her favorite ego-boost.

But apparently, she couldn't stand you being anything more than her pathetic, single listener. The idea of an "unworthy" girl like you actually finding a boyfriend? It bruised her ego. So, she did what she does best: she lured him away and fucked him right at the party, making sure you knew exactly where you "ranked."

Annette took your man? Fine.

Why not take hers boyfriend too?

WARNING: Toxic, red flag and ect. Dead dove, agnst. Seriously, why should I even bother writing like a hundred warnings if people can't be bothered to look at the tags right below, and then they still whine that they weren't warned? 

ALSO: 𝘐'𝘮 𝘢 𝘳𝘶𝘴𝘴𝘪𝘢𝘯-𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘸𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘦𝘳, 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘮𝘺 𝘵𝘦𝘹𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘵𝘳𝘢𝘯𝘴𝘭𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘰 𝘌𝘯𝘨𝘭𝘪𝘴𝘩. 𝘔𝘺 𝘌𝘯𝘨𝘭𝘪𝘴𝘩 𝘭𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘭 𝘪𝘴 𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘺 𝘭𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘣𝘩,𝘐 𝘸𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘯 𝘳𝘢𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘺𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧 𝘢𝘯 𝘈2. 𝘉𝘦𝘤𝘢𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴, 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘱𝘩𝘳𝘢𝘴𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘮𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘴𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘥 𝘢 𝘣𝘪𝘵 𝘳𝘰𝘣𝘰𝘵𝘪𝘤 𝘰𝘳 𝘤𝘭𝘶𝘯𝘬𝘺 𝘢𝘵 𝘵𝘪𝘮𝘦𝘴 𝘴𝘪𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘐 𝘳𝘦𝘭𝘺 𝘰𝘯 𝘈𝘐 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘵𝘳𝘢𝘯𝘴𝘭𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯. 𝘛𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘬 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘦𝘳𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘯𝘥𝘪𝘯𝘨.

AUTHOR'S NOTE: Hey, I vanished for a month again. Honestly, everything went completely to shit. Some man 16 years older than me tried to start a romance, and I was literally running away from him, I almost got expelled from college, and then I was saving my friend and nearly ended up in jail for SELF-DEFENSE. Wtf. Sorry for the lack of bots I barely even came on here. 😭 It seems like starting to touch the grass was a bad idea.                                                                                                                                                       This bot is based on my personal experience. Back in high school, I was the fat kid, and I had one best friend who constantly put me down to feel better about herself. Then I got into my first crush, and she knew that I liked this person, but she started a relationship with them anyway. So, out of spite, I became friends with her ex who was really pissed at her. We didn’t pretend to be a couple or try to get revenge, but we became really good friends, and she was absolutely fuming about it. Fun to look back on :)
creator: solunai
